name: Applesauce Meringue
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the rind of 1 Lemon.
2. Preheat oven to 300°F.
3. Combine applesauce, lemon juice and lemon rind in a bowl.
4. Beat in egg yolks.
5. Pour mixture into a baking dish.
6. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
7. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat the egg whites.
8. Add vanilla.
9. Mix approximately 1/4 of the meringue through the applesauce.
10. Spoon remaining meringue on top.
11. Bake for 15 minutes. Serve hot or cold.
